allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor objectif.html: SMART methodology, personal branding & mobile optimization

Major changes:
- Replace step titles with SMART terms (Spécifique, Mesurable, Atteignable, Réaliste, Temporel)
- Switch to informal tone (tu/ta instead of vous/votre) for personal branding
- Change "Nouveau Projet" to "Nouvelle Ambition" for better positioning
- Import Rifton font for navbar consistency
- Enhance progress bar visibility (3px height, positioned below navbar)
- Optimize mobile experience:
  - Fix navbar logo on single line (white-space: nowrap)
  - Responsive typography and spacing
  - Improved footer visibility with gradient background
  - Hide back button on mobile for better UX
  - Proper padding adjustments for content spacing
- Add margin-top to steps for better visual separation
- Improve footer styling with z-index and background gradient

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix: Make navigation buttons visible on mobile

Changes:
- Convert .app-footer from position:fixed to position:relative
- Remove fixed positioning (bottom: 0, z-index) so buttons follow document flow
- Update mobile media query to show both buttons stacked vertically
- Reduce main-stage padding-bottom (100px→40px desktop, 120px→20px mobile)
- Add proper spacing and width to buttons on mobile

The buttons are now properly rendered as part of the main content
rather than floating elements, making them visible and accessible.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
